title: Cross Site Scripting Prevention Cheat Sheet¶
attack_vector:
Cross Site Scripting Prevention Cheat Sheet
¶
Introduction
¶
This cheat sheet helps developers prevent XSS vulnerabilities.
Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) is a misnomer. Originally this term was derived from early versions of the attack that were primarily focused on stealing data cross-site. Since then, the term has widened to include injection of basically any content.
